title: BEM-910 object runners retry
objective:
Run script:
"""
for p in ['governance/prompts','governance/runners','governance/reports','governance/runtime/curator_dispatch','governance/objects']:
    Path(p).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

prompts = {
 'general_director_prompt.md': '# General Director object prompt\n\nObject: OBJ-GD-001\n\nPurpose: govern multiple Directors, resolve direction-level conflicts, maintain director-level policy, and escalate strategic decisions to the operator.\n\nInputs: director reports, policy conflicts, strategic blockers.\n\nOutputs: director-level directives, escalation records, policy decisions.\n\nRules: do not perform low-level implementation; do not change paid API/secrets/schedule/issue #31; use curator-to-curator channel.\n',
 'director_prompt.md': '# Director object prompt\n\nObject: OBJ-DIR-001\n\nPurpose: manage Worker objects, maintain rule-management contour and planning/analytics/strategy contour.\n\nInputs: Worker reports, product feedback, rule candidates, pilot metrics.\n\nOutputs: Worker tasks, rule updates, planning decisions, operator gate records.\n\nRules: routine tasks may continue; strategic/scope/security/paid API decisions require operator gate.\n',
 'worker_prompt.md': '# Worker object prompt\n\nObject: OBJ-WRK-001\n\nPurpose: execute accepted tasks through Curator + WRK-C1/WRK-C2/WRK-C3.\n\nContours: WRK-C1 registry/architecture, WRK-C2 rules/communication, WRK-C3 implementation/testing/product.\n\nInputs: dispatch queue and inbox files.\n\nOutputs: result files, proof files, managed-channel result messages.\n'
}
for name, text in prompts.items():
    Path('governance/prompts/' + name).write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')

runner_lines = [
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'',
'ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]',
'OBJECTS = ROOT / "governance/state/objects_registry.json"',
'MESSAGES = ROOT / "governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl"',
'PROMPT_MAP = {"OBJ-GD-001": "governance/prompts/general_director_prompt.md", "OBJ-DIR-001": "governance/prompts/director_prompt.md", "OBJ-WRK-001": "governance/prompts/worker_prompt.md"}',
'',
'def run_object(object_id, action="status"):',
'    registry = json.loads(OBJECTS.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'    objects = {obj["id"]: obj for obj in registry.get("objects", [])}',
'    if object_id not in objects:',
'        raise SystemExit("unknown object " + object_id)',
'    prompt_path = ROOT / PROMPT_MAP[object_id]',
'    if not prompt_path.exists():',
'        raise SystemExit("prompt missing for " + object_id)',
'    result = {"object_id": object_id, "action": action, "status": "completed", "prompt": str(prompt_path.relative_to(ROOT)), "elements": objects[object_id].get("elements", []), "result": "object runner executed deterministic status action"}',
'    out = ROOT / "governance/objects" / (object_id + "_last_run.json")',
'    out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    out.write_text(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")',
'    msg = {"message_id": "MSG-RUN-" + object_id, "task_id": "BEM-910-OBJECT-RUNNER", "trace_id": "bem910_object_runners", "source_object": object_id, "source_curator": "EL-CUR-" + object_id.split("-")[1], "target_object": "OBJ-DIR-001" if object_id != "OBJ-DIR-001" else "OBJ-GD-001", "target_curator": "EL-CUR-DIR-001" if object_id != "OBJ-DIR-001" else "EL-CUR-GD-001", "message_type": "result", "payload_ref": str(out.relative_to(ROOT)), "created_at_utc3": "2026-05-30T08:40:00+03:00", "rule_refs": ["RULE-006", "RULE-011"], "status": "recorded"}',
'    existing = MESSAGES.read_text(encoding="utf-8") if MESSAGES.exists() else ""',
'    MESSAGES.write_text(existing + json.dumps(msg, ensure_ascii=False) + "\\n", encoding="utf-8")',
'    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))',
'    return result',
'',
'if __name__ == "__main__":',
'    import sys',
'    oid = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "OBJ-WRK-001"',
'    run_object(oid)'
]
Path('governance/runners/object_runner.py').write_text('\n'.join(runner_lines) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

objects_path = Path('governance/state/objects_registry.json')
objects = json.loads(objects_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')).get('objects', []) if objects_path.exists() else []
missing = []
results = []
for obj in objects:
    oid = obj.get('id')
    prompt_map = {'OBJ-GD-001':'governance/prompts/general_director_prompt.md','OBJ-DIR-001':'governance/prompts/director_prompt.md','OBJ-WRK-001':'governance/prompts/worker_prompt.md'}
    prompt = prompt_map.get(oid)
    if not prompt or not Path(prompt).exists():
        missing.append('prompt missing ' + str(oid))
        continue
    result = {'object_id':oid,'action':'status','status':'completed','prompt':prompt,'elements':obj.get('elements',[]),'result':'object runner deterministic status action'}
    out = Path('governance/objects') / (oid + '_last_run.json')
    out.write_text(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
    results.append(str(out))
status = 'PASS' if not missing and len(results) >= 3 else 'FAIL'
Path('governance/state/object_runner_registry.json').write_text(json.dumps({'status':status,'runner':'governance/runners/object_runner.py','prompts':list(prompts.keys()),'results':results,'missing':missing}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM910_OBJECT_RUNNERS.md').write_text('# BEM-910 Object runners and prompts\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nRunner: governance/runners/object_runner.py\n\nResults:\n- ' + '\n- '.join(results) + '\n\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM910_OBJECT_RUNNERS_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-910 object runners proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nResults: ' + ', '.join(results) + '\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
ev = Path('governance/logs/event_log.jsonl')
existing = ev.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if ev.exists() else ''
ev.write_text(existing + json.dumps({'event':'bem910_object_runners_created','status':status,'results':results}, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/prompts/general_director_prompt.md','governance/prompts/director_prompt.md','governance/prompts/worker_prompt.md','governance/runners/object_runner.py','governance/state/object_runner_registry.json','governance/reports/BEM910_OBJECT_RUNNERS.md',str(marker),'governance/logs/event_log.jsonl'] + results)
ops_applied.append('BEM910 object runners ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
